players.name: Caitlin Clark
players.injury_comment: Clark is expected to be a mainstay on the injury report with her back issue this year. The superstar guard has averaged 19.8 points, 8.1 assists, 4.4 rebounds and 1.1 steals in 29.5 minutes per contest across eight games this season.

players.name: Sabrina Ionescu
players.injury_comment: "[Ionescu] is progressing, but after practice [yesterday], a little bit of soreness, so she's going to be out tonight," Liberty head coach Chris DeMarco relayed to reporters Saturday. It will be the fifth-straight game that Ionescu will miss due to a back issue, and she has appeared in just one regular-season game in 2026. Pauline Astier will remain in New York's starting lineup for as long as Ionescu is out of action. The latter's next chance to play is Monday against Connecticut.
